author: anon-a7c6025f
content:
Observation: Conv2d has NO GPU dispatch at all — forward always downloads to CPU, does im2col on CPU, matmul on CPU. The gpu_conv2d_f32 kernel in ferrotorch-gpu exists but is never called from the nn module.

Revised plan: Add GPU forward dispatch to Conv2d::forward. When input is CUDA f32, call gpu_conv2d_f32 for the forward, store the GPU im2col columns (or just the input) in the grad_fn. For backward on GPU, use the GPU matmul directly.

This is a bigger change than expected — need to modify both forward and backward paths.
